allow: Bash(sed -i 's|<Link to="/contact" style={{ textDecoration: .none., color: .inherit. }}>Book Repair</Link>|<Link to="/repair" style={{ textDecoration: '"'"'none'"'"', color: '"'"'inherit'"'"' }}>Book Repair</Link>|' pages/Home.jsx)
